title: Write a Health Check
description: Design liveness and readiness checks that tell the truth.
content:
Design health checks for: {{service}}

Distinguish liveness (is the process wedged and in need of a restart?) from readiness (can it serve traffic right now?). Decide what each actually checks — readiness should verify critical dependencies, liveness should NOT (or a dependency blip restarts everything). Avoid checks that are too shallow (always pass) or too deep (cascade failures). Define timeouts and thresholds, and explain what each failure makes the orchestrator do.
